svg.title: E-commerce Analytics Engineering Project Architecture
svg.desc: Five-layer pipeline: data generator, raw layer, dbt staging, dbt marts with star schema, and BI dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the data generator layer in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the raw layer in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the dbt staging layer in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the dbt marts and star schema in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the BI and metric layer in this project')
sendPrompt('How should I set up Git and CI/CD for this project?')

svg.text: domain: trendyol-style e-commerce · orders · customers · products · sellers
